content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff and changed implementation files. `cargo test`, `cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and `nix build` pass under `nix develop`/Nix, but I found one correctness gap in the PR comment filtering.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:503 and src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:513 do not implement the required “line-comments since the most recent push” check in the real port. `pr_status` always sets `latest_push_at: None`, so `comment_is_since_latest_push` falls back at src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:887 to filtering only comments whose `commit_id` or `original_commit_id` equals the current head SHA. Comments created after the latest push but anchored to an older commit/diff position are dropped, so green CI plus a +1 reaction can auto-merge despite bot findings. Populate a real latest-push/review watermark, or otherwise filter comments by `created_at` against the current head update, and cover the real-port behavior with a test.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This violates the bead’s explicit bot-findings gate and can allow automatic merge when a blocking bot line comment exists.
